This eternal time is beyond the understanding capability
of human mind. It is the wonder that is infinite and the ultimate
divinity.

Introduction 3
2. Divisible Time
Humans try to study time by applying divisions on it. The
bigger divisions such as Maha Kalpa, Manvantara, Yuga etc
(or modem divisions such as millennium, century etc), and
the normal divisions such as Year, Month, Day, Khati, Vikhati
etc (or the modem divisions such as Hour, Minute, Second
etc) and the minute divisions such as Prana, Truti etc (or the
modem divisions such as milli second, micro second, nano
second etc) are all the results of this effort.
All these conceptual divisions have existence only in mind
- the mind of humans or animals with thinking capability. If
there .is no mind (no thinking) then all these divisions vanish,
